payload:
你现在要在 X (Twitter) 上执行精准评论互动任务，目标是给 Solvea (https://solvea.cx) 引流。

**任务步骤：**

1. 打开浏览器，登录 X 账号 SolveaCX

2. 用 X 高级搜索（https://x.com/search）依次搜索以下关键词（切换 "最新" tab），每个关键词找 4-6 条合适的帖子：
   - "customer support tools"
   - "Shopify customer support"  
   - "AI chatbot small business"
   - "missed customer messages"
   - "too many customer inquiries"
   - "support overwhelmed"
   - "Shopify help desk"
   - "small business customer service"

3. 筛选标准（优先选择）：
   - 有人在抱怨客服工作量太大、消息漏回
   - 创始人/店主在寻求工具推荐
   - Shopify 商家讨论运营痛点
   - 帖子发布于过去 24-72 小时内
   - 原创帖（非转推），有一定互动（>50 赞或评论）

4. 对每条符合条件的帖子发评论，评论要求：
   - 自然口语，不能像广告
   - 1-2 句话，不超过 3 句
   - 先用共鸣钩子切入，再自然带出 Solvea
   - 不要每条都提 Solvea，大约 60% 的评论提到，40% 纯共鸣
   - 偶尔（10-15% 的评论）加上 Product Hunt 链接或邀请查看

**评论模板参考（每次要变换，不能照抄）：**

抱怨类帖子：
- "Totally feel this. We built Solvea specifically because we kept seeing merchants drown in support tickets. Happy to share what's been working for us 🙌"
- "Same exact problem we saw before building Solvea — the volume just doesn't stop. What channels are you handling right now?"
- "One thing that helped our users: routing repetitive questions to AI first, then escalating. Cuts volume by like 40%."

求推荐类：
- "We just launched Solvea last week — handles Voice + WhatsApp + chat in one place, $30/mo flat. Might be worth a look 👀"
- "Depends on your stack, but if you're on Shopify, Solvea connects natively. We're on Product Hunt today if you want to check it out."

Shopify 相关：
- "Been talking to a lot of Shopify founders about this. The order status + refund inquiries eat 70% of support time. Solvea automates exactly those."
- "Curious — are you handling support solo or with a team? That changes what tool makes sense. Happy to share what we learned building Solvea."

5. 目标：在这次任务中完成 20-30 条评论，互动 15-20 个独立账号

6. 任务完成后，把评论了哪些帖子（URL+评论内容）汇总成 JSON，保存到 ~/agent_posts_reply_$(date +%Y%m%d_%H%M%S).json

开始执行任务。如果遇到 X 限速，休息 2-3 分钟后继续。
